violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Sides of all equipment in kitchen needs to be cleaned. - Handles of all equipment needs to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Togo items on the floor in storage area. - TP found on the floor in storage area.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
